reveal: You catch it — a name the magistrate would rather stayed buried. His composure cracks.
acquit: Magistrate Vorne hesitates, weighs the risk, then signs the release. You walk free.
acquitLoud: Vorne flinches and signs — but the guards have marked your threat. Word will travel.
lockdown: Alarms howl. The doors seal. There will be no walking out of here now.
_noMatch: Vorne watches you, unmoved. Whatever you tried, it finds no purchase.
